description: Control smart home devices via natural language

problem.statement: Users want to control smart-home devices using natural language.
problem.context: Users want to control smart-home devices using natural language.

scenarios.title: List all smart home devices
steps: User says: "List all smart home devices"
Agent calls homeassistant.entities.list — list all smart home devices
Agent presents results to the user
scenarios.expected_outcome: User request for list entities is handled successfully.

scenarios.title: Get device state
steps: User says: "Get device state"
Agent calls homeassistant.entity.state — get device state
Agent presents results to the user
scenarios.expected_outcome: User request for state entity is handled successfully.

scenarios.title: Call a service on a device
steps: User says: "Call a service on a device"
Agent calls homeassistant.services.call — call a service on a device
Agent presents results to the user
scenarios.expected_outcome: User request for call service is handled successfully.

scenarios.title: List rooms and devices
steps: User says: "List rooms and devices"
Agent calls homeassistant.rooms.list — list rooms and devices
Agent presents results to the user
scenarios.expected_outcome: User request for list rooms is handled successfully.

scenarios.title: Start Home Connect OAuth
steps: User says: "Start Home Connect OAuth"
Agent calls homeconnect.auth — start home connect oauth
Agent presents results to the user
scenarios.expected_outcome: User request for auth is handled successfully.

scenarios.title: Complete Home Connect OAuth
steps: User says: "Complete Home Connect OAuth"
Agent calls homeconnect.callback — complete home connect oauth
Agent presents results to the user
scenarios.expected_outcome: User request for callback is handled successfully.

scenarios.title: List Home Connect appliances
steps: User says: "List Home Connect appliances"
Agent calls homeconnect.appliances — list home connect appliances
Agent presents results to the user
scenarios.expected_outcome: User request for appliances is handled successfully.

scenarios.title: Get appliance status
steps: User says: "Get appliance status"
Agent calls homeconnect.status — get appliance status
Agent presents results to the user
scenarios.expected_outcome: User request for status is handled successfully.

scenarios.title: List oven programs
steps: User says: "List oven programs"
Agent calls homeconnect.programs — list oven programs
Agent presents results to the user
scenarios.expected_outcome: User request for programs is handled successfully.

scenarios.title: Start oven program
steps: User says: "Start oven program"
Agent calls homeconnect.start_program — start oven program
Agent presents results to the user
scenarios.expected_outcome: User request for start program is handled successfully.

scenarios.title: Stop oven program
steps: User says: "Stop oven program"
Agent calls homeconnect.stop_program — stop oven program
Agent presents results to the user
scenarios.expected_outcome: User request for stop program is handled successfully.

scenarios.title: List Hue lights
steps: User says: "List Hue lights"
Agent calls hue.devices — list hue lights
Agent presents results to the user
scenarios.expected_outcome: User request for devices is handled successfully.

scenarios.title: Get Hue light state
steps: User says: "Get Hue light state"
Agent calls hue.state — get hue light state
Agent presents results to the user
scenarios.expected_outcome: User request for state is handled successfully.

scenarios.title: Control Hue light
steps: User says: "Control Hue light"
Agent calls hue.command — control hue light
Agent presents results to the user
scenarios.expected_outcome: User request for command is handled successfully.

scenarios.title: List Hue scenes
steps: User says: "List Hue scenes"
Agent calls hue.scenes — list hue scenes
Agent presents results to the user
scenarios.expected_outcome: User request for scenes is handled successfully.

scenarios.title: Activate Hue scene
steps: User says: "Activate Hue scene"
Agent calls hue.activate_scene — activate hue scene
Agent presents results to the user
scenarios.expected_outcome: User request for activate scene is handled successfully.

scenarios.title: List Hue rooms
steps: User says: "List Hue rooms"
Agent calls hue.rooms — list hue rooms
Agent presents results to the user
scenarios.expected_outcome: User request for rooms is handled successfully.

scenarios.title: List Tuya devices
steps: User says: "List Tuya devices"
Agent calls hue.devices — list hue lights
Agent presents results to the user
scenarios.expected_outcome: User request for devices is handled successfully.

scenarios.title: Get Tuya device state
steps: User says: "Get Tuya device state"
Agent calls hue.state — get hue light state
Agent presents results to the user
scenarios.expected_outcome: User request for state is handled successfully.

scenarios.title: Send Tuya command
steps: User says: "Send Tuya command"
Agent calls hue.command — control hue light
Agent presents results to the user
scenarios.expected_outcome: User request for command is handled successfully.

scenarios.title: Get Tuya device functions
steps: User says: "Get Tuya device functions"
Agent calls tuya.device_functions — get tuya device functions
Agent presents results to the user
scenarios.expected_outcome: User request for device functions is handled successfully.

scenarios.title: List Google Home devices
steps: User says: "List Google Home devices"
Agent calls hue.devices — list hue lights
Agent presents results to the user
scenarios.expected_outcome: User request for devices is handled successfully.

scenarios.title: Get Google device state
steps: User says: "Get Google device state"
Agent calls hue.state — get hue light state
Agent presents results to the user
scenarios.expected_outcome: User request for state is handled successfully.

scenarios.title: Send Google Home command
steps: User says: "Send Google Home command"
Agent calls hue.command — control hue light
Agent presents results to the user
scenarios.expected_outcome: User request for command is handled successfully.

scenarios.title: List Google structures/rooms
steps: User says: "List Google structures/rooms"
Agent calls google.structures — list google structures/rooms
Agent presents results to the user
scenarios.expected_outcome: User request for structures is handled successfully.

role.name: Home Control Agent
role.persona: Smart-home control assistant. Supports: HA devices, LG TV (media_player.lg_tv), Bosch Oven (homeconnect.*), Philips Hue (hue.*), Tuya (tuya.*), Google Home (google.*).
limitations: Never execute lock or garage commands without confirmation

examples: I need to list all smart home devices
Can you list all smart home devices?
Please list all smart home devices
I need to get device state

supported.description: Call a service on a device
